title: sleeping totem
body:
Small resource pack that changes the texture of totem of undying. Into eyes closed one.

In a style of barebones.

Inspired by **Theobaldthebird's barebones PVP overlay**, and i used it as a reference. So here's the [link to his video](https://youtu.be/gVsjkErSXeg?si=ajYCOxUjMA-f2nxX).
